eas_text: A civil authority has issued A SHELTER IN PLACE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Hall, NE; at 12:31 PM ON MAR 10, 2026 Effective until 02:31 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Shelter in place due to suspicious device all residents in the 4300 block of Sherwood Rd, shelter in place due to suspicious device
